title: Component Libraries Built on Bootstrap Quiz
description: Test your knowledge about popular libraries that extend Bootstrap's capabilities.

questions.question: Which framework is React Bootstrap specifically built for?
What's the main difference between standard Bootstrap and React Bootstrap?
options: React Bootstrap is faster to load.
React Bootstrap replaces standard Bootstrap's JavaScript with React components.
React Bootstrap is a full design and logic rewrite.

questions.question: Which library combines Bootstrap with Google's Material Design principles?
Is jQuery a dependency for React Bootstrap?
options: Yes, it's still needed for some components.
Only if you want to use the legacy components.

questions.question: What is one major benefit of using an administrative UI kit like CoreUI?
options: It provides pre-built, specialized components and layouts for complex dashboards.
It's completely free to use without any restrictions.
It's the only way to build a dashboard.
